---
title: "COUNTERFEIT NEWS"
#subtitle: ""
author: Kelli Anderson
format: html
image: https://farm4.static.flickr.com/3065/3025164416_5024b75e8c.jpg
image-alt: "A newspaper with the headline IRAQ WAR ENDS"
---

![Counterfit News by Kelli Anderson](https://farm4.static.flickr.com/3065/3025164416_5024b75e8c.jpg "A newspaper with the headline IRAQ WAR ENDS")



<https://www.kellianderson.com/projects/fakenewspapers.html>
